key_elements: System UI customizations (status bar, navigation bar)

patterns_discovered.description: Implemented complete M3 color token system with on-color pairs and container variants
patterns_discovered.significance: Ensures brand consistency and accessibility across light/dark modes

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar as parent for automatic light/dark mode
patterns_discovered.significance: Provides automatic theme switching based on system settings without custom logic

patterns_discovered.description: Organized color definitions in logical sections: primary, secondary, tertiary, error, background, surface, outline
patterns_discovered.significance: Makes theme structure maintainable and follows Material Design conventions
Creates cohesive visual experience across system UI elements

patterns_discovered.description: Well-commented XML with clear section headers and implementation notes
patterns_discovered.significance: Improves maintainability for future theme modifications

gotchas_discovered.description: Theme references 18 color resources (md_theme_primary, md_theme_secondary, etc.) that must be defined in values/colors.xml
gotchas_discovered.risk: App will crash at runtime if referenced colors are not defined
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify all md_theme_* colors are defined in colors.xml before building

gotchas_discovered.description: Theme uses NoActionBar variant, so activities must implement their own action bars or use AppBarLayout
gotchas_discovered.risk: Activities expecting built-in ActionBar will not function
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure layout hierarchy includes AppBarLayout or equivalent toolbar

gotchas_discovered.risk: Compilation will fail if Material3 dependency is missing or incorrect version
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Confirm Material3 dependency is in build.gradle with compatible version

gotchas_discovered.description: android:windowLightStatusBar=true requires proper edge-to-edge configuration and system bar handling
gotchas_discovered.risk: Status bar content may be unreadable if system bar colors not properly defined
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Test on multiple API levels and ensure status bar icon contrast is adequate

gotchas_discovered.description: DayNight theme requires separate color definitions in values-night/colors.xml for dark mode
gotchas_discovered.risk: Dark mode will use light mode colors, resulting in poor visibility
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Create values-night/colors.xml with appropriate dark mode color values

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created a comprehensive Material Design 3 theme with proper color system, DayNight support, and system UI customization
highlights: Automatic light/dark mode support via DayNight parent
First attempt successful with no iterations needed

recommendations.recommendation: Verify Material3 library is added to build.gradle with version >=1.5.0
recommendations.rationale: DayNight theme requires Material3 library; missing dependency will cause compilation failure

recommendations.recommendation: Create values/colors.xml with all 18 md_theme_* color definitions
recommendations.rationale: Theme references these colors; missing definitions will cause runtime crash

recommendations.recommendation: Create values-night/colors.xml with dark mode variants of all color definitions
recommendations.rationale: DayNight theme requires proper dark mode colors for usability in dark mode

recommendations.recommendation: Test theme on API 21, 28, and 33+ to verify status bar and navigation bar styling
recommendations.rationale: System bar colors and edge-to-edge behavior vary across Android versions

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding typography styles (TextAppearance) to support complete design system
recommendations.rationale: Material Design 3 includes typography scale that should be implemented for consistency

recommendations.recommendation: Add values-v31+ variants if targeting high API levels with enhanced Material3 features
recommendations.rationale: API 31+ supports additional Material3 color tokens and dynamic color features
